issues.description: OnPlay effect is severely incomplete. Should include: (1) look at 5 cards from top of deck, (2) reveal up to 1 {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type card other than [Jinbe], (3) add it to hand, (4) place rest at bottom of deck in any order. Current SearchDeck action lacks the 5-card limit, type filter ({The Seven Warlords of the Sea}), name exclusion ([Jinbe]), and the 'place rest at bottom' mechanic.

OnAttack action uses Rest, but card text says 'place up to 1 Character with a cost of 1 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck' — this is a deck manipulation action, not a Rest action. Should be a custom action or sequence that moves a character to bottom of deck.
Target scope is ChooseOpponentCharacter, but effect should target 'up to 1 Character' (could be player's own or opponent's). Scope is ambiguous and likely wrong.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type card other than [Jinbe] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
[When Attacking] Place up to 1 Character with a cost of 1 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.

filter.value: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
